languages.text: "Кем бы ты ни был, позволь сразу пресечь твои пагубные мысли. Я — Ювенна фон Валанциус, единственная и, разумеется, законная наследница. Помни об этом, и, быть может, наше маленькое недоразумение еще обернется приятной беседой. Давай оставим нашу беседу камерной и не будем привлекать внимание стражи. Иначе объясняться придется нам обоим — с той лишь разницей, что у тебя на это будут считаные секунды, прежде чем тебя расстреляют по моему приказу".

traits.locale_text: "Кем бы ты ни был, позволь сразу пресечь твои пагубные мысли. Я — Ювенна фон Валанциус, единственная и, разумеется, законная наследница. Помни об этом, и, быть может, наше маленькое недоразумение еще обернется приятной беседой. Давай оставим нашу беседу камерной и не будем привлекать внимание стражи. Иначе объясняться придется нам обоим — с той лишь разницей, что у тебя на это будут считаные секунды, прежде чем тебя расстреляют по моему приказу".

languages.text: "Whoever you are, allow me to put a stop to your scurrilous thoughts at once. I am Juvenna von Valancius, the sole and, of course, legitimate heir of my dynasty. Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."
languages.original_text: "Кем бы ты ни был, позволь сразу пресечь твои пагубные мысли. Я — Ювенна фон Валанциус, единственная и, разумеется, законная наследница. Помни об этом, и, быть может, наше маленькое недоразумение еще обернется приятной беседой. Давай оставим нашу беседу камерной и не будем привлекать внимание стражи. Иначе объясняться придется нам обоим — с той лишь разницей, что у тебя на это будут считаные секунды, прежде чем тебя расстреляют по моему приказу".

Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."

Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."

"Whoever you are, allow me to put a stop to your scurrilous thoughts at once. I am Juvenna von Valancius, the sole and, of course, legitimate heir of my dynasty. Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."

languages.text: “不论你是谁，先把你那些龌龊的想法收起来。我是尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯，本王朝唯一的合法继承人。记住这一点，也许我们这点小误会还能变成一次愉快的交谈。我们必须谨慎行事，不要引起守卫的注意。否则，我们都得去交代情况，但与我不同，你只有几秒钟的时间……然后就会在我的命令下被当场击毙。”
languages.original_text: "Whoever you are, allow me to put a stop to your scurrilous thoughts at once. I am Juvenna von Valancius, the sole and, of course, legitimate heir of my dynasty. Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."

traits.locale_text: “不论你是谁，先把你那些龌龊的想法收起来。我是尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯，本王朝唯一的合法继承人。记住这一点，也许我们这点小误会还能变成一次愉快的交谈。我们必须谨慎行事，不要引起守卫的注意。否则，我们都得去交代情况，但与我不同，你只有几秒钟的时间……然后就会在我的命令下被当场击毙。”

languages.text: « Qui que vous soyez, permettez-moi de dissiper immédiatement vos pensées calomnieuses. Je suis Juvenna von Valancius, l'unique héritière légitime, bien évidemment, de ma dynastie. Si vous gardez cela à l'esprit, nous devrions pouvoir transformer cette petite méprise en conversation plaisante. Mieux vaut rester {mf|discrets|discrètes} pour éviter d'attirer l'attention des gardes. Autrement, nous devrons {mf|tous|toutes} les deux nous expliquer, mais contrairement à moi, vous n'aurez que quelques secondes pour le faire... avant que je leur donne l'ordre de vous abattre. »
languages.original_text: "Whoever you are, allow me to put a stop to your scurrilous thoughts at once. I am Juvenna von Valancius, the sole and, of course, legitimate heir of my dynasty. Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."

Mieux vaut rester {mf|discrets|discrètes} pour éviter d'attirer l'attention des gardes. Autrement, nous devrons {mf|tous|toutes} les deux nous expliquer, mais contrairement à moi, vous n'aurez que quelques secondes pour le faire... avant que je leur donne l'ordre de vous abattre. »

languages.text: "Her kimseniz o aşağılık düşüncelerinize hemen bir son vermeme müsaade edin. Ben Juvenna von Valancius, hanedanlığımın tek ve elbette meşru vârisiyim. Bunu aklınızdan çıkarmayın, belki o zaman küçük yanlış anlaşılmamız keyifli bir sohbete dönüşebilir. Sağduyulu olmalı ve muhafızların dikkatini çekmemeliyiz. Aksi takdirde ikimiz de kendimizi açıklamak zorunda kalacağız. Fakat benden farklı olarak sizin sadece saniyeleriniz olacak... Sonrasında emrimle vurulacaksınız."
languages.original_text: "Whoever you are, allow me to put a stop to your scurrilous thoughts at once. I am Juvenna von Valancius, the sole and, of course, legitimate heir of my dynasty. Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."

traits.locale_text: "Her kimseniz o aşağılık düşüncelerinize hemen bir son vermeme müsaade edin. Ben Juvenna von Valancius, hanedanlığımın tek ve elbette meşru vârisiyim. Bunu aklınızdan çıkarmayın, belki o zaman küçük yanlış anlaşılmamız keyifli bir sohbete dönüşebilir. Sağduyulu olmalı ve muhafızların dikkatini çekmemeliyiz. Aksi takdirde ikimiz de kendimizi açıklamak zorunda kalacağız. Fakat benden farklı olarak sizin sadece saniyeleriniz olacak... Sonrasında emrimle vurulacaksınız."

languages.text: «Sea quien sea, permítame poner fin a sus injuriosas ideas. Yo soy Juvenna von Valancius, única y, evidentemente, legítima heredera de mi dinastía. Recuerde eso y este pequeño malentendido aún puede convertirse en una conversación placentera. Debemos ser discretos y no llamar la atención de los guardias. En otro caso, amb{mf|o|a}s tendremos que dar explicaciones y, al contrario que yo, usted solo tendrá unos segundos para hacerlo... antes de que ordene su fusilamiento».
languages.original_text: "Whoever you are, allow me to put a stop to your scurrilous thoughts at once. I am Juvenna von Valancius, the sole and, of course, legitimate heir of my dynasty. Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."

traits.locale_text: «Sea quien sea, permítame poner fin a sus injuriosas ideas. Yo soy Juvenna von Valancius, única y, evidentemente, legítima heredera de mi dinastía. Recuerde eso y este pequeño malentendido aún puede convertirse en una conversación placentera. Debemos ser discretos y no llamar la atención de los guardias. En otro caso, amb{mf|o|a}s tendremos que dar explicaciones y, al contrario que yo, usted solo tendrá unos segundos para hacerlo... antes de que ordene su fusilamiento».

languages.text: "Wer Ihr auch seid, erlaubt mir, Euren ehrenrührigen Gedanken ein Ende zu machen. Ich bin Juvenna von Valancius, die einzige und rechtmäßige Erbin meiner Dynastie. Merkt Euch das, dann kann aus unserem kleinen Missverständnis vielleicht noch eine angenehme Unterhaltung werden. Wir müssen diskret sein und dürfen nicht die Aufmerksamkeit der Wachen erregen. Andernfalls müssen wir uns beide erklären ... aber im Gegensatz zu mir werdet Ihr dazu nur ein paar Sekunden Zeit haben ... ehe Ihr auf meinen Befehl hin erschossen werdet."
languages.original_text: "Whoever you are, allow me to put a stop to your scurrilous thoughts at once. I am Juvenna von Valancius, the sole and, of course, legitimate heir of my dynasty. Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."

traits.locale_text: "Wer Ihr auch seid, erlaubt mir, Euren ehrenrührigen Gedanken ein Ende zu machen. Ich bin Juvenna von Valancius, die einzige und rechtmäßige Erbin meiner Dynastie. Merkt Euch das, dann kann aus unserem kleinen Missverständnis vielleicht noch eine angenehme Unterhaltung werden. Wir müssen diskret sein und dürfen nicht die Aufmerksamkeit der Wachen erregen. Andernfalls müssen wir uns beide erklären ... aber im Gegensatz zu mir werdet Ihr dazu nur ein paar Sekunden Zeit haben ... ehe Ihr auf meinen Befehl hin erschossen werdet."

languages.text: 「君が誰であろうと、この場では君の汚い考えを止める。私はユベナ・フォン・ヴァランキウス、この家の唯一、そして当然ながら正当な相続人だ。覚えておけ。そうすれば、この小さな誤解は、まだ楽しい会話に変わるかもしれない。注意深く、警備隊の目を引かないように。そうでなければ、私たちは説明せねばならないが、私とは違って、君には秒単位で説明する時間しか与えられない...そして、私の命令で撃たれることになるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Whoever you are, allow me to put a stop to your scurrilous thoughts at once. I am Juvenna von Valancius, the sole and, of course, legitimate heir of my dynasty. Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."
